description: A plein-air painting depicting a small Ottoman-style mosque with a white minaret rising against a blue sky with scattered clouds. The mosque has a red tile roof, stone and whitewashed walls with arched windows, and a green arched doorway. Adjacent to it is a two-story building with a wooden balcony. Tall cypress and other trees rise behind the buildings. In the courtyard or square before the mosque, a woman in red and a child stand, with another figure visible to the right. The ground is sandy and sunlit.
